metadata.description: Tints your terminal background based on Claude Code's state, so you can tell at a glance whether Claude is working, waiting on you, or asking a question. Works in any terminal that supports OSC 11 (Ghostty, iTerm2, kitty, alacritty, wezterm, xterm).

plugins.name: claude-tint
plugins.description: Tints terminal background to reflect Claude Code state: blue while responding, yellow when asking a question, default when idle.
